Document:
## Beckoning the Unknown
Should you attain enough power, you will be able to call forth The Monument. Use the respective action to mark a spot, upon which the majority of the cult must agree for The Monument to appear.
Once the Monument is placed, it can be used to [bold]Beckon [color=#4cabb3]the Unknown[/bold][/color]. Any cultist may do so by interacting with the Monument.
Be prepared to defend the Monument during the Beckoning, as just one waylaid action from a single disruptive soul will bring this ritual to a sudden, unceremonious halt.
## Fracturing
As long as the monument is active, you can bring crewmembers (or even fellow cultists) in critical condition close to The monument to [color=#4cabb3]fracture[/color] their physical form and accelerate the Beckoning.
Doing so binds their mind and body to The Monument. They will stop suffocating, and their mind will be ripped out of their body, able to wander around the station. A rare act of mercy before the End.
Should the Beckoning be interrupted, they will immediately return back to normal, though their wounds will still be present.
